extra.reason: Initial GitHub Actions CI workflow implemented and pushed using JDK 25
Maven dependencies (Java-WebSocket and Jackson) successfully configured in pom.xml on JDK 25 and merged.
Coordinates system, Cell, CellKind, and Board classes implemented and merged.
NNUEModel and NNUEModelTest with Clipped ReLU activation function implemented and merged.
Project README.md successfully created and populated.
Spotless formatting checks successfully added and verified in Maven pom.xml and CI workflow.
Alpha-Beta search framework with minimax evaluation and pruning rules successfully implemented and merged.
BaseConnectionSearch BFS 8-connected flood fill successfully implemented, tested, and merged.
MoveValidator implementation with bounds, target kind rules, and 8-connected flood fill connectivity checks successfully implemented, tested, and merged.
MoveGenerator implementation successfully implemented, formatted, verified with tests, and merged.
BotWebSocketClient successfully implemented with Jackson message parsing and WebSocket lifecycle callbacks, tested, and merged.
Implemented case-insensitive Owner/Kind keys and integer kind values in parseBoardFromSnapshot.
Implemented ChallengeReceivedMessage and AcceptChallengeMessage, integrated them into HandshakeHandler to accept challenges.
Implemented IgnoredMessage as defaultImpl for BaseMessage in Jackson, gracefully ignoring all unhandled type ids without logging warning errors.
Implemented BoardFeatureMapper to encode 12x12 board states into 2016-dimensional float vector.
Resized NNUEModel input size to 2016 features and updated matrix multiplication checks.
Integrated NNUE evaluation into SearchEngine.java minimax leaf node evaluation.
Pivot design document docs/nnue-design-pivot.md outlines the 2016 whole-board feature map structure.
Implemented BoardFeatureMapper and updated NNUEModel / SearchEngine to support 864-feature 1v1 perspective-based mapping.
Implemented train.py, trained model on games.db dataset, and created JSON weight loader in NNUEModel.java.
Implemented SelfPlayGenerator.java to generate training records using minimax exploration.
Removed raw JSON websocket printouts, added clean opponent action notifications, and implemented console search diagnostics.
Implemented SearchTimeoutException and findBestActionWithTimeLimit using Iterative Deepening (IDDFS) and 1s timeout control.
Implemented in GameLoopHandler.java, handling start, turn change, move made, and end events.
Merged PR 29 which implemented move ordering sorting captures and base attacks.
SelfPlayGenerator.java already maps whole-board 12x12 states to 864 features as required by the pivot design.
Implemented efficient updatable accumulator, speeding up evaluations by 10x (under 60ms for ~10k nodes).
Implemented SearchResult packaging and serialization of score, depth, nodesEvaluated, and timeMs in GameLoopHandler move payloads.
Added thorough unit tests for diagonal connectivity, neutral cuts, base connectivity, out-of-bounds, base capture, and neutral placement pairs.
Added jacoco-maven-plugin to pom.xml enforcing 30% line coverage quality gate.
Implemented run_sparring.py script to automate Go server, Go bot, and Java bot execution, along with Java users_update challenge triggering.
Reviewed open duplicate PRs #35 and #36, identified request-changes findings, and prepared posting guidance.

Done. Deeper Java search is NOT the fix: at 5000ms reaching depth 4-9 / ~205k nodes (deeper+wider than GoBot's depth 4-6 / ~80k), the bot still went 0-18 vs baseline. Conclusion: the eval net is the sole bottleneck, not search. Same weights; nnue_weights.json untouched. GameLoopHandler.java search budget bumped to 5000ms + per-move [SEARCH] logging (uncommitted).

Done. train.py now has train/val split, L2 decay, configurable hidden size, early stopping (uncommitted). Sweep verdict: limiter is LABEL NOISE, not capacity/data - net barely overfits (gap +0.01..0.05), weight decay inert, val MSE floors ~0.76 vs 0.999 constant baseline. Recommend hidden=64 if kept. Fix requires better labels (-> ntd.7, ntd.8), not a bigger net. Captured in bd memory nnue-value-label-noise-ceiling.
All 5 children complete: board feature mapping, efficient accumulator, forward-pass inference, whole-board mapper, input layer. NNUE representation is done and in use by SearchEngine/NNUEModel.
Implemented Java SQLite GameImporter that replays recorded moves through SearchEngine.applyAction, handles neutrals/draw labels, deduplicates PGN rows, and has parity-focused tests.
Implemented Java NNUETrainer with deterministic SGD, loss checks, and NNUEModel-compatible weight export/load tests.
Completed Java training/import/retraining implementation with quality gates passing locally.
Superseded by direct local implementation; duplicate Jules PRs should not be merged as-is.

Implemented opt-in PeriodicRetrainer with injected live SearchEngine, candidate-vs-current gauntlet, conservative promotion threshold, live hot-swap, versioned weights, metadata, and promotion/rejection tests.

Merged PR #38 containing full Java-native search upgrades (Transposition Table, Zobrist hashing, PVS, move ordering with Killer/History, Quiescence Search with depth limit, and Opening Book). All 65 unit tests pass in CI.
Verified PlaceNeutralsAction support is fully implemented in MoveGenerator, SearchEngine, GameLoopHandler, and unit tests.
Merged PR #47 into v2 branch
Merged PR #52 into v2 branch
